description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named auto release that triggers when a tag matching v*.*.* is pushed. The workflow runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the code, installs NSIS, extracts the version from the tag, sets up x64 and x86 MSVC, caches and sets up libraries, builds assets, creates a draft release, and submits the assets. It also installs checksum, sets up the Chocolatey API, creates a Chocolatey installer, packages it as a nupkg, and pushes the package to chocolatey.org using the provided CHOCOLATEY_API_KEY.
